name: openai-language-model-provider
description: Pionus OpenAI Language Model Provider exposes OpenAI models through the VS Code Language Model API.

scripts.test: npm run check && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && node --test out-test/test/*.test.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && node test/runIntegration.mjs

pionus.codex.baseURL.description: ChatGPT Codex backend URL used for Responses requests and model discovery.

pionus.codex.clientVersion.description: client_version query parameter for Codex model discovery.

pionus.codex.model.description: Fallback model ID when discovery is unavailable.

pionus.codex.instructions.default: You are a helpful coding assistant integrated with VS Code.

pionus.codex.defaultReasoningEffort.description: Fallback reasoning effort when VS Code does not provide one.

pionus.codex.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum output tokens when the active credential type supports it.

pionus.codex.enableImageInput.description: Attempt to forward supported image data parts to Codex models that advertise image input.

pionus.codex.includeIdeContext.description: Include lightweight active-editor context in provider instructions.

pionus.codex.ideContextMaxSelectionBytes.description: Maximum bytes of selected active-editor text to include as IDE context.

pionus.codex.includeCodexInstructions.description: Include discovered Codex AGENTS.md instructions in provider requests.

pionus.codex.projectDocFallbackFilenames.description: Additional fallback filenames for Codex-style project instruction discovery.

pionus.codex.projectDocMaxBytes.description: Maximum combined bytes for discovered project instructions.

pionus.codex.enableAgentProfiles.description: Apply Codex-like provider agent profiles such as codex-plan and codex-execute.

pionus.codex.activeAgentProfile.description: Active provider agent profile. Leave empty to auto-select.

pionus.codex.mirrorCodexConfiguredAgents.description: Expose compatible Codex configured agents as codex-* provider profiles.

pionus.codex.agentProfilePaths.description: Additional directories containing Codex-style agent TOML files.

pionus.codex.defaultPlanningProfile.description: Provider profile used when the request appears to be planning-oriented.

pionus.codex.defaultExecutionProfile.description: Provider profile used when host tools are available for execution.

pionus.codex.enableSkillInjection.description: Allow configured SKILL.md files to be injected into provider instructions.

pionus.codex.skillPaths.description: Paths to SKILL.md files or directories containing skills.

pionus.codex.enableCliBridge.description: Enable explicit Codex CLI bridge commands. Mutation-capable commands still ask for confirmation.

pionus.codex.cliExecutable.description: Optional Codex CLI executable path. Leave empty to resolve from PATH.

pionus.codex.reviewModel.description: Optional model override for review commands.

pionus.codex.showUsageInStatusBar.description: Show the last completed model usage in the status bar.

pionus.codex.modelPricingUsdPerMTok.description: Optional per-model USD pricing for input, cached input, and output tokens per 1M tokens.
